news.t: NEOS Investments Announces May 2026 ETF Suite Distributions

overview.description: The NEOS Long/Short Equity Income ETF (NLSI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long/short alternatives. The fund combines a long/short equity approach with an options overlay across mid- and large-cap US equities. The fund seeks high monthly income and potential equity appreciation. NLSI was launched on Dec 10, 2025 and is issued by Neos.

data.title: NEOS Investments Announces May 2026 ETF Suite Distributions
data.text: WESTPORT, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--NEOS Investments, an asset management firm comprised of leaders and pioneers in the options-based ETF space, announces May monthly distribution amounts for their suit...
